title: nvm_read: redundant metadata round-trip on every read
description: nvm_read (nvm.rs:187) always calls nvm_metadata before the actual read, adding a full HSM IPC round-trip per read. Over a transport (SPI, shared memory IPC) each round-trip is not a free function call. At scale — reading many NVM objects in a loop, or repeatedly reading a known-size object — this doubles transport latency. Fix: add nvm_read_with_len(id, offset, len) that skips the metadata fetch when the caller already knows the size, and make the current nvm_read call it after the metadata fetch (so the extra allocation path is pay-what-you-use).
